nemo_retriever.params package#

Submodules#

nemo_retriever.params.chunk_bundle module#

nemo_retriever.params.models module#

pydantic model nemo_retriever.params.models.ASRParams[source]#

Bases: _ParamsModel

Params for ASR (Parakeet/Riva gRPC or local transformers backend).

Choice of remote-NIM vs local-model is made by the ASRActor archetype (CPU variant = remote, GPU variant = local), not by a flag here. Pass audio_endpoints to force the remote variant on any host; leave them empty to let the archetype pick GPU (local) when a GPU is present and fall back to remote (NVCF default) when not.

Show JSON schema
{
   "title": "ASRParams",
   "description": "Params for ASR (Parakeet/Riva gRPC or local transformers backend).\n\nChoice of remote-NIM vs local-model is made by the :class:`ASRActor`\narchetype (CPU variant = remote, GPU variant = local), not by a flag here.\nPass ``audio_endpoints`` to force the remote variant on any host; leave\nthem empty to let the archetype pick GPU (local) when a GPU is present\nand fall back to remote (NVCF default) when not.",
   "type": "object",
   "properties": {
      "audio_endpoints": {
         "default": [
            null,
            null
         ],
         "maxItems": 2,
         "minItems": 2,
         "prefixItems": [
            {
               "anyOf": [
                  {
                     "type": "string"
                  },
                  {
                     "type": "null"
                  }
               ]
            },
            {
               "anyOf": [
                  {
                     "type": "string"
                  },
                  {
                     "type": "null"
                  }
               ]
            }
         ],
         "title": "Audio Endpoints",
         "type": "array"
      },
      "audio_infer_protocol": {
         "default": "grpc",
         "title": "Audio Infer Protocol",
         "type": "string"
      },
      "audio_infer_mode": {
         "default": "auto",
         "enum": [
            "auto",
            "online",
            "offline"
         ],
         "title": "Audio Infer Mode",
         "type": "string"
      },
      "function_id": {
         "anyOf": [
            {
               "type": "string"
            },
            {
               "type": "null"
            }
         ],
         "default": null,
         "title": "Function Id"
      },
      "auth_token": {
         "anyOf": [
            {
               "type": "string"
            },
            {
               "type": "null"
            }
         ],
         "default": null,
         "title": "Auth Token"
      },
      "segment_audio": {
         "default": false,
         "title": "Segment Audio",
         "type": "boolean"
      }
   },
   "additionalProperties": false
}

Config:

  • extra: str = forbid

Fields:

  • audio_endpoints (Tuple[Optional[str], Optional[str]])

  • audio_infer_mode (Literal['auto', 'online', 'offline'])

  • audio_infer_protocol (str)

  • auth_token (Optional[str])

  • function_id (Optional[str])

  • segment_audio (bool)

Validators:

field audio_endpoints: Tuple[str | None, str | None] = (None, None)#
Validated by:

  • _resolve_api_keys

field audio_infer_mode: Literal['auto', 'online', 'offline'] = 'auto'#
Validated by:

  • _resolve_api_keys

field audio_infer_protocol: str = 'grpc'#
Validated by:

  • _resolve_api_keys

field auth_token: str | None = None#
Validated by:

  • _resolve_api_keys

field function_id: str | None = None#
Validated by:

  • _resolve_api_keys

field segment_audio: bool = False#
Validated by:

  • _resolve_api_keys

pydantic model nemo_retriever.params.models.AudioChunkParams[source]#

Bases: _ParamsModel

Params for media chunking (audio/video split). Aligned with nemo_retriever.api dataloader.

Set enabled=False (when wired through VideoSplitActor) to skip audio chunking and ASR on a video pipeline — useful for visual-only recall benchmarks. MediaChunkActor ignores this flag for the audio-only pipeline since chunking is the whole point there.

audio_only=True on a video input extracts only the audio track, runs ASR over it, and skips the visual branch entirely — no frame extraction, no OCR, no audio/visual fusion.

video_audio_separate is accepted for compatibility but ignored by MediaChunkActor on video inputs: this ASR chunking path always demuxes videos to ASR-safe audio chunks and does not emit video-container chunks. Use VideoSplitActor or the video pipeline when you need audio+visual video processing.

Show JSON schema
{
   "title": "AudioChunkParams",
   "description": "Params for media chunking (audio/video split). Aligned with `nemo_retriever.api` dataloader.\n\nSet ``enabled=False`` (when wired through ``VideoSplitActor``) to skip\naudio chunking and ASR on a video pipeline \u2014 useful for visual-only\nrecall benchmarks. ``MediaChunkActor`` ignores this flag for the\naudio-only pipeline since chunking is the whole point there.\n\n``audio_only=True`` on a video input extracts only the audio track,\nruns ASR over it, and skips the visual branch entirely \u2014 no frame\nextraction, no OCR, no audio/visual fusion.\n\n``video_audio_separate`` is accepted for compatibility but ignored by\n``MediaChunkActor`` on video inputs: this ASR chunking path always demuxes\nvideos to ASR-safe audio chunks and does not emit video-container chunks.\nUse ``VideoSplitActor`` or the video pipeline when you need audio+visual\nvideo processing.",
   "type": "object",
   "properties": {
      "enabled": {
         "default": true,
         "title": "Enabled",
         "type": "boolean"
      },
      "split_type": {
         "default": "size",
         "enum": [
            "size",
            "time",
            "frame"
         ],
         "title": "Split Type",
         "type": "string"
      },
      "split_interval": {
         "default": 450,
         "title": "Split Interval",
         "type": "integer"
      },
      "audio_only": {
         "default": false,
         "title": "Audio Only",
         "type": "boolean"
      },
      "video_audio_separate": {
         "default": false,
         "title": "Video Audio Separate",
         "type": "boolean"
      }
   },
   "additionalProperties": false
}

Config:

  • extra: str = forbid

Fields:

  • audio_only (bool)

  • enabled (bool)

  • split_interval (int)

  • split_type (Literal['size', 'time', 'frame'])

  • video_audio_separate (bool)

Validators:

field audio_only: bool = False#
Validated by:

  • _resolve_api_keys

field enabled: bool = True#
Validated by:

  • _resolve_api_keys

field split_interval: int = 450#
Validated by:

  • _resolve_api_keys

field split_type: Literal['size', 'time', 'frame'] = 'size'#
Validated by:

  • _resolve_api_keys

field video_audio_separate: bool = False#
Validated by:

  • _resolve_api_keys

pydantic model nemo_retriever.params.models.CaptionParams[source]#

Bases: LLMInferenceParams

Show JSON schema
{
   "title": "CaptionParams",
   "type": "object",
   "properties": {
      "temperature": {
         "default": 1.0,
         "title": "Temperature",
         "type": "number"
      },
      "top_p": {
         "anyOf": [
            {
               "type": "number"
            },
            {
               "type": "null"
            }
         ],
         "default": null,
         "title": "Top P"
      },
      "max_tokens": {
         "default": 1024,
         "title": "Max Tokens",
         "type": "integer"
      },
      "endpoint_url": {
         "anyOf": [
            {
               "type": "string"
            },
            {
               "type": "null"
            }
         ],
         "default": null,
         "title": "Endpoint Url"
      },
      "model_name": {
         "default": "nvidia/NVIDIA-Nemotron-Nano-12B-v2-VL-BF16",
         "title": "Model Name",
         "type": "string"
      },
      "api_key": {
         "anyOf": [
            {
               "type": "string"
            },
            {
               "type": "null"
            }
         ],
         "default": null,
         "title": "Api Key"
      },
      "prompt": {
         "default": "Caption the content of this image:",
         "title": "Prompt",
         "type": "string"
      },
      "system_prompt": {
         "anyOf": [
            {
               "type": "string"
            },
            {
               "type": "null"
            }
         ],
         "default": "/no_think",
         "title": "System Prompt"
      },
      "batch_size": {
         "default": 8,
         "title": "Batch Size",
         "type": "integer"
      },
      "device": {
         "anyOf": [
            {
               "type": "string"
            },
            {
               "type": "null"
            }
         ],
         "default": null,
         "title": "Device"
      },
      "hf_cache_dir": {
         "anyOf": [
            {
               "type": "string"
            },
            {
               "type": "null"
            }
         ],
         "default": null,
         "title": "Hf Cache Dir"
      },
      "context_text_max_chars": {
         "default": 0,
         "title": "Context Text Max Chars",
         "type": "integer"
      },
      "tensor_parallel_size": {
         "default": 1,
         "title": "Tensor Parallel Size",
         "type": "integer"
      },
      "gpu_memory_utilization": {
         "default": 0.5,
         "title": "Gpu Memory Utilization",
         "type": "number"
      },
      "caption_infographics": {
         "default": false,
         "title": "Caption Infographics",
         "type": "boolean"
      },
      "extra_body": {
         "additionalProperties": true,
         "title": "Extra Body",
         "type": "object"
      }
   },
   "additionalProperties": false
}

{
   "title": "ChartParams",

      },

         "default": 8,

         "type": "integer"

   },
   "$defs": {

         "additionalProperties": false,
         "properties": {
            "invoke_url": {
               "anyOf": [

                     "type": "string"

         "type": "object"
      },
      "RemoteRetryParams": {
         "additionalProperties": false,
         "properties": {

               "default": 32,
               "title": "Remote Max Pool Workers",
               "type": "integer"
            },
            "remote_max_retries": {
               "default": 5,
               "title": "Remote Max Retries",
               "type": "integer"
            },
            "remote_max_429_retries": {
               "default": 3,
               "title": "Remote Max 429 Retries",
               "type": "integer"
            }
         },
         "title": "RemoteRetryParams",
         "type": "object"
      }
   },
   "additionalProperties": false
}

         "default": 32,

         "type": "string"
      },
      "embed_inference_batch_size": {
         "default": 16,
         "title": "Embed Inference Batch Size",
         "type": "integer"

         "default": "vllm",

         "type": "string"

         "default": 128,

      },

Bases: _ParamsModel

Show JSON schema
{
   "title": "ExtractParams",
   "type": "object",
   "properties": {
      "extract_text": {
         "default": true,
         "title": "Extract Text",
         "type": "boolean"
      },
      "extract_images": {
         "default": true,
         "title": "Extract Images",
         "type": "boolean"
      },
      "extract_tables": {
         "default": true,
         "title": "Extract Tables",
         "type": "boolean"
      },
      "extract_charts": {
         "default": true,
         "title": "Extract Charts",
         "type": "boolean"
      },
      "extract_infographics": {
         "default": true,
         "title": "Extract Infographics",
         "type": "boolean"
      },
      "extract_page_as_image": {
         "anyOf": [
            {
               "type": "boolean"
            },
            {
               "type": "null"
            }
         ],
         "default": null,
         "title": "Extract Page As Image"
      },
      "method": {
         "default": "pdfium",
         "title": "Method",
         "type": "string"
      },
      "use_page_elements": {
         "default": true,
         "title": "Use Page Elements",
         "type": "boolean"
      },
      "use_table_structure": {
         "default": false,
         "title": "Use Table Structure",
         "type": "boolean"
      },
      "table_output_format": {
         "anyOf": [
            {
               "enum": [
                  "pseudo_markdown",
                  "markdown"
               ],
               "type": "string"
            },
            {
               "type": "null"
            }
         ],
         "default": null,
         "title": "Table Output Format"
      },
      "use_graphic_elements": {
         "default": false,
         "title": "Use Graphic Elements",
         "type": "boolean"
      },
      "dpi": {
         "default": 200,
         "title": "Dpi",
         "type": "integer"
      },
      "image_format": {
         "default": "jpeg",
         "title": "Image Format",
         "type": "string"
      },
      "jpeg_quality": {
         "default": 100,
         "title": "Jpeg Quality",
         "type": "integer"
      },
      "render_mode": {
         "default": "fit_to_model",
         "enum": [
            "full_dpi",
            "fit_to_model"
         ],
         "title": "Render Mode",
         "type": "string"
      },
      "inference_batch_size": {
         "default": 8,
         "title": "Inference Batch Size",
         "type": "integer"
      },
      "ocr_model_dir": {
         "anyOf": [
            {
               "type": "string"
            },
            {
               "type": "null"
            }
         ],
         "default": null,
         "title": "Ocr Model Dir"
      },
      "ocr_version": {
         "default": "v2",
         "enum": [
            "v1",
            "v2"
         ],
         "title": "Ocr Version",
         "type": "string"
      },
      "ocr_lang": {
         "anyOf": [
            {
               "enum": [
                  "multi",
                  "english"
               ],
               "type": "string"
            },
            {
               "type": "null"
            }
         ],
         "default": null,
         "title": "Ocr Lang"
      },
      "invoke_url": {
         "anyOf": [
            {
               "type": "string"
            },
            {
               "type": "null"
            }
         ],
         "default": null,
         "title": "Invoke Url"
      },
      "api_key": {
         "anyOf": [
            {
               "type": "string"
            },
            {
               "type": "null"
            }
         ],
         "default": null,
         "title": "Api Key"
      },
      "request_timeout_s": {
         "default": 60.0,
         "title": "Request Timeout S",
         "type": "number"
      },
      "page_elements_invoke_url": {
         "anyOf": [
            {
               "type": "string"
            },
            {
               "type": "null"
            }
         ],
         "default": null,

               "type": "string"
            },
            {

            }

            }
         ],

         "anyOf": [
            {
               "type": "string"
            },
            {
               "type": "null"
            }
         ],
         "default": null,
         "title": "Ocr Invoke Url"
      },
      "ocr_api_key": {
         "anyOf": [
            {
               "type": "string"
            },
            {
               "type": "null"
            }
         ],
         "default": null,
         "title": "Ocr Api Key"
      },
      "ocr_request_timeout_s": {
         "anyOf": [
            {
               "type": "number"
            },
            {
               "type": "null"
            }
         ],
         "default": null,
         "title": "Ocr Request Timeout S"

      "graphic_elements_invoke_url": {
         "anyOf": [
            {
               "type": "string"
            },
            {
               "type": "null"

         "default": null,

         "anyOf": [
            {
               "type": "string"
            },
            {
               "type": "null"
            }
         ],
         "default": null,
         "title": "Table Structure Invoke Url"
      },
      "nemotron_parse_invoke_url": {
         "anyOf": [
            {
               "type": "string"
            },
            {
               "type": "null"
            }
         ],
         "default": null,
         "title": "Nemotron Parse Invoke Url"
      },
      "nemotron_parse_model": {
         "anyOf": [
            {
               "type": "string"
            },
            {
               "type": "null"
            }
         ],
         "default": null,
         "title": "Nemotron Parse Model"
      },
      "output_column": {
         "default": "page_elements_v3",
         "title": "Output Column",
         "type": "string"
      },
      "num_detections_column": {
         "default": "page_elements_v3_num_detections",
         "title": "Num Detections Column",
         "type": "string"
      },
      "counts_by_label_column": {
         "default": "page_elements_v3_counts_by_label",
         "title": "Counts By Label Column",
         "type": "string"
      },
      "remote_retry": {
         "$ref": "#/$defs/RemoteRetryParams"
      },
      "batch_tuning": {
         "$ref": "#/$defs/BatchTuningParams"
      }
   },
   "$defs": {
      "BatchTuningParams": {
         "additionalProperties": false,
         "properties": {
            "debug_run_id": {
               "default": "unknown",
               "title": "Debug Run Id",
               "type": "string"
            },
            "pdf_split_batch_size": {
               "default": 1,
               "title": "Pdf Split Batch Size",
               "type": "integer"
            },
            "pdf_extract_batch_size": {
               "default": 4,
               "title": "Pdf Extract Batch Size",
               "type": "integer"
            },
            "pdf_extract_num_cpus": {
               "default": 2,
               "title": "Pdf Extract Num Cpus",
               "type": "number"
            },
            "pdf_extract_workers": {
               "anyOf": [
                  {
                     "type": "integer"
                  },
                  {
                     "type": "null"
                  }
               ],
               "default": null,
               "title": "Pdf Extract Workers"
            },
            "page_elements_batch_size": {
               "default": 24,
               "title": "Page Elements Batch Size",
               "type": "integer"
            },
            "detect_batch_size": {
               "default": 24,
               "title": "Detect Batch Size",
               "type": "integer"
            },
            "ocr_inference_batch_size": {
               "anyOf": [
                  {
                     "type": "integer"
                  },
                  {
                     "type": "null"
                  }
               ],
               "default": null,
               "title": "Ocr Inference Batch Size"
            },
            "page_elements_workers": {
               "anyOf": [
                  {
                     "type": "integer"
                  },
                  {
                     "type": "null"
                  }
               ],
               "default": null,
               "title": "Page Elements Workers"
            },
            "ocr_workers": {
               "anyOf": [
                  {
                     "type": "integer"
                  },
                  {
                     "type": "null"
                  }
               ],
               "default": null,
               "title": "Ocr Workers"
            },
            "detect_workers": {
               "anyOf": [
                  {
                     "type": "integer"
                  },
                  {
                     "type": "null"
                  }
               ],
               "default": null,
               "title": "Detect Workers"
            },
            "page_elements_cpus_per_actor": {
               "default": 1,
               "title": "Page Elements Cpus Per Actor",
               "type": "number"
            },
            "ocr_cpus_per_actor": {
               "default": 1,
               "title": "Ocr Cpus Per Actor",
               "type": "number"
            },
            "table_structure_workers": {
               "anyOf": [
                  {
                     "type": "integer"
                  },
                  {
                     "type": "null"
                  }
               ],
               "default": null,
               "title": "Table Structure Workers"
            },
            "table_structure_batch_size": {
               "anyOf": [
                  {
                     "type": "integer"
                  },
                  {
                     "type": "null"
                  }
               ],
               "default": null,
               "title": "Table Structure Batch Size"
            },
            "table_structure_cpus_per_actor": {
               "default": 1,
               "title": "Table Structure Cpus Per Actor",
               "type": "number"
            },
            "embed_workers": {
               "anyOf": [
                  {
                     "type": "integer"
                  },
                  {
                     "type": "null"
                  }
               ],
               "default": null,
               "title": "Embed Workers"
            },
            "embed_batch_size": {
               "default": 32,
               "title": "Embed Batch Size",
               "type": "integer"
            },
            "embed_cpus_per_actor": {
               "default": 1,
               "title": "Embed Cpus Per Actor",
               "type": "number"
            },
            "gpu_page_elements": {
               "anyOf": [
                  {
                     "type": "number"
                  },
                  {
                     "type": "null"
                  }
               ],
               "default": null,
               "title": "Gpu Page Elements"
            },
            "gpu_ocr": {
               "anyOf": [
                  {
                     "type": "number"
                  },
                  {
                     "type": "null"
                  }
               ],
               "default": null,
               "title": "Gpu Ocr"
            },
            "gpu_table_structure": {
               "anyOf": [
                  {
                     "type": "number"
                  },
                  {
                     "type": "null"
                  }
               ],
               "default": null,
               "title": "Gpu Table Structure"
            },
            "gpu_embed": {
               "anyOf": [
                  {
                     "type": "number"
                  },
                  {
                     "type": "null"
                  }
               ],
               "default": null,
               "title": "Gpu Embed"
            },
            "nemotron_parse_workers": {
               "anyOf": [
                  {
                     "type": "integer"
                  },
                  {
                     "type": "null"
                  }
               ],
               "default": null,
               "title": "Nemotron Parse Workers"
            },
            "gpu_nemotron_parse": {
               "anyOf": [
                  {
                     "type": "number"
                  },
                  {
                     "type": "null"
                  }
               ],
               "default": null,
               "title": "Gpu Nemotron Parse"
            },
            "nemotron_parse_batch_size": {
               "anyOf": [
                  {
                     "type": "integer"
                  },
                  {
                     "type": "null"
                  }
               ],
               "default": null,
               "title": "Nemotron Parse Batch Size"
            },
            "store_workers": {
               "anyOf": [
                  {
                     "type": "integer"
                  },
                  {
                     "type": "null"
                  }
               ],
               "default": null,
               "title": "Store Workers"
            },
            "inference_batch_size": {
               "default": 8,
               "title": "Inference Batch Size",
               "type": "integer"
            }
         },
         "title": "BatchTuningParams",
         "type": "object"
      },
      "RemoteRetryParams": {
         "additionalProperties": false,
         "properties": {
            "remote_max_pool_workers": {
               "default": 32,
               "title": "Remote Max Pool Workers",
               "type": "integer"
            },
            "remote_max_retries": {
               "default": 5,
               "title": "Remote Max Retries",
               "type": "integer"
            },
            "remote_max_429_retries": {
               "default": 3,
               "title": "Remote Max 429 Retries",
               "type": "integer"
            }
         },
         "title": "RemoteRetryParams",
         "type": "object"
      }
   },
   "additionalProperties": false
}

Bases: _ParamsModel

Show JSON schema
{
   "title": "IngestExecuteParams",
   "type": "object",
   "properties": {
      "show_progress": {
         "default": false,
         "title": "Show Progress",
         "type": "boolean"
      },
      "return_failures": {
         "default": false,
         "title": "Return Failures",
         "type": "boolean"
      },
      "save_to_disk": {
         "default": false,
         "title": "Save To Disk",
         "type": "boolean"
      },
      "return_traces": {
         "default": false,
         "title": "Return Traces",
         "type": "boolean"
      },
      "return_results": {
         "default": true,
         "title": "Return Results",
         "type": "boolean"
      },
      "parallel": {
         "default": false,
         "title": "Parallel",
         "type": "boolean"
      },
      "max_workers": {
         "anyOf": [
            {
               "type": "integer"
            },
            {
               "type": "null"
            }
         ],
         "default": null,
         "title": "Max Workers"
      },
      "gpu_devices": {
         "items": {
            "type": "string"
         },
         "title": "Gpu Devices",
         "type": "array"
      },
      "page_chunk_size": {
         "default": 32,
         "title": "Page Chunk Size",
         "type": "integer"
      },
      "runtime_metrics_dir": {
         "anyOf": [
            {
               "type": "string"
            },
            {
               "type": "null"
            }
         ],
         "default": null,
         "title": "Runtime Metrics Dir"
      },
      "runtime_metrics_prefix": {
         "anyOf": [
            {
               "type": "string"
            },
            {
               "type": "null"
            }
         ],
         "default": null,
         "title": "Runtime Metrics Prefix"
      }
   },
   "additionalProperties": false
}

         "title": "Debug",

pydantic model nemo_retriever.params.models.LLMInferenceParams[source]#

Bases: _ParamsModel

Reusable LLM sampling / generation parameters.

Inherit from this model to add temperature, top_p, and max_tokens to any task that invokes an LLM (captioning, summarization, etc.).

Show JSON schema
{
   "title": "LLMInferenceParams",
   "description": "Reusable LLM sampling / generation parameters.\n\nInherit from this model to add temperature, top_p, and max_tokens\nto any task that invokes an LLM (captioning, summarization, etc.).",
   "type": "object",
   "properties": {
      "temperature": {
         "default": 1.0,
         "title": "Temperature",
         "type": "number"
      },
      "top_p": {
         "anyOf": [
            {
               "type": "number"
            },
            {
               "type": "null"
            }
         ],
         "default": null,
         "title": "Top P"
      },
      "max_tokens": {
         "default": 1024,
         "title": "Max Tokens",
         "type": "integer"
      }
   },
   "additionalProperties": false
}

Config:

  • extra: str = forbid

Fields:

  • max_tokens (int)

  • temperature (float)

  • top_p (Optional[float])

Validators:

  • _check_max_tokens » max_tokens

  • _check_temperature » temperature

  • _check_top_p » top_p

field max_tokens: int = 1024#
Validated by:

  • _check_max_tokens

  • _resolve_api_keys

field temperature: float = 1.0#
Validated by:

  • _check_temperature

  • _resolve_api_keys

field top_p: float | None = None#
Validated by:

  • _check_top_p

  • _resolve_api_keys

to_sampling_kwargs() → dict[str, Any][source]#

Build a dict of sampling parameters suitable for LLM inference calls.

top_p is only included when explicitly set (not None), because many backends (vLLM, OpenAI, NIM) change behaviour when the key is present vs. absent.

pydantic model nemo_retriever.params.models.LLMRemoteClientParams[source]#

Bases: _ParamsModel

Transport / connection parameters for any remote LLM client.

Pairs with LLMInferenceParams (sampling) to fully specify a call. api_key is auto-resolved from the environment by _ParamsModel when left as None.

Show JSON schema
{
   "title": "LLMRemoteClientParams",
   "description": "Transport / connection parameters for any remote LLM client.\n\nPairs with :class:`LLMInferenceParams` (sampling) to fully specify a\ncall.  ``api_key`` is auto-resolved from the environment by\n:class:`_ParamsModel` when left as ``None``.",
   "type": "object",
   "properties": {
      "model": {
         "title": "Model",
         "type": "string"
      },
      "api_base": {
         "anyOf": [
            {
               "type": "string"
            },
            {
               "type": "null"
            }
         ],
         "default": null,
         "title": "Api Base"
      },
      "api_key": {
         "anyOf": [
            {
               "type": "string"
            },
            {
               "type": "null"
            }
         ],
         "default": null,
         "title": "Api Key"
      },
      "num_retries": {
         "default": 3,
         "title": "Num Retries",
         "type": "integer"
      },
      "timeout": {
         "default": 120.0,
         "title": "Timeout",
         "type": "number"
      },
      "extra_params": {
         "additionalProperties": true,
         "title": "Extra Params",
         "type": "object"
      }
   },
   "additionalProperties": false,
   "required": [
      "model"
   ]
}

Config:

  • extra: str = forbid

Fields:

  • api_base (Optional[str])

  • api_key (Optional[str])

  • extra_params (dict[str, Any])

  • model (str)

  • num_retries (int)

  • timeout (float)

Validators:

  • _check_retries » num_retries

  • _check_timeout » timeout

field api_base: str | None = None#
Validated by:

  • _resolve_api_keys

field api_key: str | None = None#
Validated by:

  • _resolve_api_keys

field extra_params: dict[str, Any] [Optional]#
Validated by:

  • _resolve_api_keys

field model: str [Required]#
Validated by:

   "type": "object",

         "default": "lancedb",
         "title": "Lancedb Uri",
         "type": "string"
      },
      "table_name": {
         "default": "nv-ingest",
         "title": "Table Name",
         "type": "string"
      },
      "overwrite": {
         "default": true,
         "title": "Overwrite",
         "type": "boolean"
      },
      "create_index": {
         "default": true,
         "title": "Create Index",
         "type": "boolean"
      },

         "title": "Index Type",
         "type": "string"
      },
      "metric": {
         "default": "l2",
         "title": "Metric",
         "type": "string"
      },
      "num_partitions": {
         "default": 16,
         "title": "Num Partitions",
         "type": "integer"
      },
      "num_sub_vectors": {
         "default": 256,
         "title": "Num Sub Vectors",
         "type": "integer"
      },
      "embedding_column": {
         "default": "text_embeddings_1b_v2",
         "title": "Embedding Column",
         "type": "string"
      },
      "embedding_key": {
         "default": "embedding",
         "title": "Embedding Key",
         "type": "string"
      },
      "include_text": {
         "default": true,
         "title": "Include Text",
         "type": "boolean"
      },
      "text_column": {
         "default": "text",
         "title": "Text Column",
         "type": "string"
      },
      "hybrid": {
         "default": false,
         "title": "Hybrid",
         "type": "boolean"
      },
      "fts_language": {
         "default": "English",
         "title": "Fts Language",
         "type": "string"
      }
   },
   "additionalProperties": false
}

         "default": false,
         "title": "Extract Charts",
         "type": "boolean"

               "default": 3,

               "type": "integer"

         "type": "object"

   },

}

pydantic model nemo_retriever.params.models.TabularExtractParams[source]#

Bases: _ParamsModel

Params for step 1: extract schema metadata and write to Neo4j.

Covers SQLAlchemy reflection of a live database and/or parsing of pre-existing SQL DDL/query files. Produces Database, Schema, Table, Column, View and Query nodes together with their relationships. The Neo4j connection is provided by get_neo4j_conn() (see tabular_data.neo4j) and is not configured here.

Show JSON schema
{
   "title": "TabularExtractParams",
   "type": "object",
   "properties": {
      "connector": {
         "default": null,
         "title": "Connector"
      }
   },
   "additionalProperties": false
}

  • arbitrary_types_allowed: bool = True

pydantic model nemo_retriever.params.models.VdbUploadParams[source]#

Bases: _ParamsModel

Post-graph vector DB upload configuration.

Sidecar metadata (meta_*) matches nv_ingest_client / metadata_and_filtered_search.ipynb: all three fields must be set together to merge columns into each chunk’s content_metadata.

Show JSON schema
{
   "title": "VdbUploadParams",
   "description": "Post-graph vector DB upload configuration.\n\nSidecar metadata (``meta_*``) matches ``nv_ingest_client`` / ``metadata_and_filtered_search.ipynb``:\nall three fields must be set together to merge columns into each chunk's ``content_metadata``.",
   "type": "object",
   "properties": {
      "vdb_op": {
         "default": "lancedb",
         "title": "Vdb Op",
         "type": "string"
      },
      "vdb_kwargs": {
         "additionalProperties": true,
         "title": "Vdb Kwargs",
         "type": "object"
      },
      "meta_dataframe": {
         "anyOf": [
            {},
            {
               "type": "null"
            }
         ],
         "default": null,
         "title": "Meta Dataframe"
      },
      "meta_source_field": {
         "anyOf": [
            {
               "type": "string"
            },
            {
               "type": "null"
            }
         ],
         "default": null,
         "title": "Meta Source Field"
      },
      "meta_fields": {
         "anyOf": [
            {
               "items": {
                  "type": "string"
               },
               "type": "array"
            },
            {
               "type": "null"
            }
         ],
         "default": null,
         "title": "Meta Fields"
      },
      "meta_join_key": {
         "default": "auto",
         "enum": [
            "auto",
            "source_id",
            "source_name"
         ],
         "title": "Meta Join Key",
         "type": "string"
      }
   },
   "additionalProperties": false
}

pydantic model nemo_retriever.params.models.VideoFrameParams[source]#

Bases: _ParamsModel

Params for video frame extraction (ffmpeg fps + perceptual-hash dedup).

Set enabled=False to skip frame extraction entirely; the video pipeline then produces only audio (ASR) rows — no frame OCR, no audio+visual fusion. Useful for ablating the visual modality or for audio-only recall benchmarks against video corpora.

dedup activates perceptual-hash (dhash) dedup before OCR. dhash catches visually-identical adjacent frames that byte-level hashing misses (encoder noise, brightness drift, etc.). On a 60s slide-heavy sample we measured ~91% duplicates collapsed at distance 5 vs ~11% for MD5 — a near-10x cut in OCR cost on slide content. Tune dedup_max_hamming_distance upward for more aggressive merging or down to 0 to require exact perceptual-hash matches.

Show JSON schema
{
   "title": "VideoFrameParams",
   "description": "Params for video frame extraction (ffmpeg fps + perceptual-hash dedup).\n\nSet ``enabled=False`` to skip frame extraction entirely; the video\npipeline then produces only audio (ASR) rows \u2014 no frame OCR, no\naudio+visual fusion. Useful for ablating the visual modality or for\naudio-only recall benchmarks against video corpora.\n\n``dedup`` activates perceptual-hash (dhash) dedup before OCR. dhash\ncatches visually-identical adjacent frames that byte-level hashing\nmisses (encoder noise, brightness drift, etc.). On a 60s slide-heavy\nsample we measured ~91% duplicates collapsed at distance 5 vs ~11%\nfor MD5 \u2014 a near-10x cut in OCR cost on slide content. Tune\n``dedup_max_hamming_distance`` upward for more aggressive merging or\ndown to 0 to require exact perceptual-hash matches.",
   "type": "object",
   "properties": {
      "enabled": {
         "default": true,
         "title": "Enabled",
         "type": "boolean"
      },
      "fps": {
         "default": 1.0,
         "exclusiveMinimum": 0.0,
         "title": "Fps",
         "type": "number"
      },
      "max_frames": {
         "anyOf": [
            {
               "type": "integer"
            },
            {
               "type": "null"
            }
         ],
         "default": null,
         "title": "Max Frames"
      },
      "dedup": {
         "default": true,
         "title": "Dedup",
         "type": "boolean"
      },
      "dedup_max_hamming_distance": {
         "default": 5,
         "title": "Dedup Max Hamming Distance",
         "type": "integer"
      },
      "dedup_max_dropped_frames": {
         "default": 2,
         "title": "Dedup Max Dropped Frames",
         "type": "integer"
      }
   },
   "additionalProperties": false
}

Config:

  • extra: str = forbid

Fields:

  • dedup (bool)

  • dedup_max_dropped_frames (int)

  • dedup_max_hamming_distance (int)

  • enabled (bool)

  • fps (float)

  • max_frames (int | None)

Validators:

field dedup: bool = True#
Validated by:

  • _resolve_api_keys

field dedup_max_dropped_frames: int = 2#
Validated by:

  • _resolve_api_keys

field dedup_max_hamming_distance: int = 5#
Validated by:

  • _resolve_api_keys

field enabled: bool = True#
Validated by:

  • _resolve_api_keys

field fps: float = 1.0#
Constraints:

  • gt = 0.0

Validated by:

  • _resolve_api_keys

field max_frames: int | None = None#
Validated by:

  • _resolve_api_keys

pydantic model nemo_retriever.params.models.VideoFrameTextDedupParams[source]#

Bases: _ParamsModel

Params for merging consecutive video_frame rows with identical OCR text.

After full-frame OCR, slides that are visible for many seconds produce a flood of frames with the same text (image-hash dedup misses them when encoder noise differs frame-to-frame). This stage groups by (source_path, text) and merges adjacent runs into a single row whose segment_start_seconds / segment_end_seconds cover the union of the run.

Tolerance is expressed in dropped frames, not seconds, so it scales with video_frame_fps: at runtime the dedup reads each group’s metadata.fps and converts to max_gap_seconds = max_dropped_frames / fps. Default 2 means we bridge gaps of up to 2 missing frames in a run — a typical safety margin for image-hash dedup leaving small holes.

Show JSON schema
{
   "title": "VideoFrameTextDedupParams",
   "description": "Params for merging consecutive video_frame rows with identical OCR text.\n\nAfter full-frame OCR, slides that are visible for many seconds produce a\nflood of frames with the same text (image-hash dedup misses them when\nencoder noise differs frame-to-frame). This stage groups by\n``(source_path, text)`` and merges adjacent runs into a single row whose\n``segment_start_seconds`` / ``segment_end_seconds`` cover the union of\nthe run.\n\nTolerance is expressed in **dropped frames**, not seconds, so it scales\nwith ``video_frame_fps``: at runtime the dedup reads each group's\n``metadata.fps`` and converts to ``max_gap_seconds = max_dropped_frames / fps``.\nDefault 2 means we bridge gaps of up to 2 missing frames in a run \u2014\na typical safety margin for image-hash dedup leaving small holes.",
   "type": "object",
   "properties": {
      "enabled": {
         "default": true,
         "title": "Enabled",
         "type": "boolean"
      },
      "max_dropped_frames": {
         "default": 2,
         "title": "Max Dropped Frames",
         "type": "integer"
      }
   },
   "additionalProperties": false
}

Config:

  • extra: str = forbid

Fields:

  • enabled (bool)

  • max_dropped_frames (int)

Validators:

field enabled: bool = True#
Validated by:

  • _resolve_api_keys

field max_dropped_frames: int = 2#
Validated by:

  • _resolve_api_keys

pydantic model nemo_retriever.params.models.WebhookParams[source]#

Bases: _ParamsModel

Configuration for the webhook notification stage.

When endpoint_url is set, selected columns from the processed batch are serialised to JSON and HTTP-POSTed to that URL. If endpoint_url is None the stage is a no-op.

Show JSON schema
{
   "title": "WebhookParams",
   "description": "Configuration for the webhook notification stage.\n\nWhen ``endpoint_url`` is set, selected columns from the processed batch\nare serialised to JSON and HTTP-POSTed to that URL.  If ``endpoint_url``\nis ``None`` the stage is a no-op.",
   "type": "object",
   "properties": {
      "endpoint_url": {
         "anyOf": [
            {
               "type": "string"
            },
            {
               "type": "null"
            }
         ],
         "default": null,
         "title": "Endpoint Url"
      },
      "columns": {
         "items": {
            "type": "string"
         },
         "title": "Columns",
         "type": "array"
      },
      "headers": {
         "additionalProperties": {
            "type": "string"
         },
         "title": "Headers",
         "type": "object"
      },
      "timeout_s": {
         "default": 30.0,
         "title": "Timeout S",
         "type": "number"
      },
      "max_retries": {
         "default": 3,
         "title": "Max Retries",
         "type": "integer"
      }
   },
   "additionalProperties": false
}

Config:

  • extra: str = forbid

Fields:

  • columns (list[str])

  • endpoint_url (str | None)

  • headers (dict[str, str])

  • max_retries (int)

  • timeout_s (float)

Validators:

Validated by:

Validated by:

  • _resolve_api_keys

Validated by:

Validated by:

nemo_retriever.params.utils module#

Shared parameter coercion and building helpers used by ingest modes.

nemo_retriever.params.utils.build_embed_kwargs(
resolved: Any,
*,
include_batch_tuning: bool = False,
) → Dict[str, Any][source]#

Flatten an EmbedParams instance into a dict ready for actor/task kwargs.

Merges runtime (always) and optionally batch_tuning sub-models. Also normalises embed_invoke_url → embedding_endpoint.

nemo_retriever.params.utils.coerce_params(
params: T | None,
model_cls: type[T],
kwargs: dict[str, Any],
) → T[source]#

Merge params and kwargs into an instance of model_cls.

  • If params is None, construct from kwargs.

  • If kwargs is non-empty, apply them as overrides via model_copy.

  • Otherwise return params unchanged.

nemo_retriever.params.utils.normalize_embed_kwargs(
kwargs: Dict[str, Any],
) → Dict[str, Any][source]#

Normalize embedding endpoint aliases in an existing kwargs dict.

nemo_retriever.params.utils.resolve_split_params(
split_config: dict[str, Any] | None,
) → dict[str, Any][source]#

Resolve a user-supplied split_config dict into per-key effective params.

Returns a dict keyed by every entry in SPLIT_CONFIG_VALID_KEYS. Each value is one of: a TextChunkParams / HtmlChunkParams instance (chunking enabled for that key), None (key absent — chunking off via the default), or False (explicit opt-out sentinel).

Per-key values supplied by the caller may be a plain dict of chunk-params fields, a pre-built TextChunkParams / HtmlChunkParams instance (passed through verbatim), None, or False.

Module contents#

pydantic model nemo_retriever.params.ASRParams[source]#

Bases: _ParamsModel

Params for ASR (Parakeet/Riva gRPC or local transformers backend).

Choice of remote-NIM vs local-model is made by the ASRActor archetype (CPU variant = remote, GPU variant = local), not by a flag here. Pass audio_endpoints to force the remote variant on any host; leave them empty to let the archetype pick GPU (local) when a GPU is present and fall back to remote (NVCF default) when not.

Show JSON schema
{
   "title": "ASRParams",
   "description": "Params for ASR (Parakeet/Riva gRPC or local transformers backend).\n\nChoice of remote-NIM vs local-model is made by the :class:`ASRActor`\narchetype (CPU variant = remote, GPU variant = local), not by a flag here.\nPass ``audio_endpoints`` to force the remote variant on any host; leave\nthem empty to let the archetype pick GPU (local) when a GPU is present\nand fall back to remote (NVCF default) when not.",
   "type": "object",
   "properties": {
      "audio_endpoints": {
         "default": [
            null,
            null
         ],
         "maxItems": 2,
         "minItems": 2,
         "prefixItems": [
            {
               "anyOf": [
                  {
                     "type": "string"
                  },
                  {
                     "type": "null"
                  }
               ]
            },
            {
               "anyOf": [
                  {
                     "type": "string"
                  },
                  {
                     "type": "null"
                  }
               ]
            }
         ],
         "title": "Audio Endpoints",
         "type": "array"
      },
      "audio_infer_protocol": {
         "default": "grpc",
         "title": "Audio Infer Protocol",
         "type": "string"
      },
      "audio_infer_mode": {
         "default": "auto",
         "enum": [
            "auto",
            "online",
            "offline"
         ],
         "title": "Audio Infer Mode",
         "type": "string"
      },
      "function_id": {
         "anyOf": [
            {
               "type": "string"
            },
            {
               "type": "null"
            }
         ],
         "default": null,
         "title": "Function Id"
      },
      "auth_token": {
         "anyOf": [
            {
               "type": "string"
            },
            {
               "type": "null"
            }
         ],
         "default": null,
         "title": "Auth Token"
      },
      "segment_audio": {
         "default": false,
         "title": "Segment Audio",
         "type": "boolean"
      }
   },
   "additionalProperties": false
}

Config:

  • extra: str = forbid

Fields:

  • audio_endpoints (Tuple[Optional[str], Optional[str]])

  • audio_infer_mode (Literal['auto', 'online', 'offline'])

  • audio_infer_protocol (str)

  • auth_token (Optional[str])

  • function_id (Optional[str])

  • segment_audio (bool)

Validators:

pydantic model nemo_retriever.params.AudioChunkParams[source]#

Bases: _ParamsModel

Params for media chunking (audio/video split). Aligned with nemo_retriever.api dataloader.

Set enabled=False (when wired through VideoSplitActor) to skip audio chunking and ASR on a video pipeline — useful for visual-only recall benchmarks. MediaChunkActor ignores this flag for the audio-only pipeline since chunking is the whole point there.

audio_only=True on a video input extracts only the audio track, runs ASR over it, and skips the visual branch entirely — no frame extraction, no OCR, no audio/visual fusion.

video_audio_separate is accepted for compatibility but ignored by MediaChunkActor on video inputs: this ASR chunking path always demuxes videos to ASR-safe audio chunks and does not emit video-container chunks. Use VideoSplitActor or the video pipeline when you need audio+visual video processing.

Show JSON schema
{
   "title": "AudioChunkParams",
   "description": "Params for media chunking (audio/video split). Aligned with `nemo_retriever.api` dataloader.\n\nSet ``enabled=False`` (when wired through ``VideoSplitActor``) to skip\naudio chunking and ASR on a video pipeline \u2014 useful for visual-only\nrecall benchmarks. ``MediaChunkActor`` ignores this flag for the\naudio-only pipeline since chunking is the whole point there.\n\n``audio_only=True`` on a video input extracts only the audio track,\nruns ASR over it, and skips the visual branch entirely \u2014 no frame\nextraction, no OCR, no audio/visual fusion.\n\n``video_audio_separate`` is accepted for compatibility but ignored by\n``MediaChunkActor`` on video inputs: this ASR chunking path always demuxes\nvideos to ASR-safe audio chunks and does not emit video-container chunks.\nUse ``VideoSplitActor`` or the video pipeline when you need audio+visual\nvideo processing.",
   "type": "object",
   "properties": {
      "enabled": {
         "default": true,
         "title": "Enabled",
         "type": "boolean"
      },
      "split_type": {
         "default": "size",
         "enum": [
            "size",
            "time",
            "frame"
         ],
         "title": "Split Type",
         "type": "string"
      },
      "split_interval": {
         "default": 450,
         "title": "Split Interval",
         "type": "integer"
      },
      "audio_only": {
         "default": false,
         "title": "Audio Only",
         "type": "boolean"
      },
      "video_audio_separate": {
         "default": false,
         "title": "Video Audio Separate",
         "type": "boolean"
      }
   },
   "additionalProperties": false
}

Config:

  • extra: str = forbid

Fields:

  • audio_only (bool)

  • enabled (bool)

  • split_interval (int)

  • split_type (Literal['size', 'time', 'frame'])

  • video_audio_separate (bool)

Validators:

field audio_only: bool = False#
Validated by:

  • _resolve_api_keys

field enabled: bool = True#
Validated by:

  • _resolve_api_keys

field split_interval: int = 450#
Validated by:

  • _resolve_api_keys

field split_type: Literal['size', 'time', 'frame'] = 'size'#
Validated by:

  • _resolve_api_keys

field video_audio_separate: bool = False#
Validated by:

  • _resolve_api_keys

{
   "title": "CaptionParams",
   "type": "object",
   "properties": {
      "temperature": {
         "default": 1.0,
         "title": "Temperature",
         "type": "number"
      },
      "top_p": {
         "anyOf": [
            {
               "type": "number"
            },
            {
               "type": "null"
            }
         ],
         "default": null,
         "title": "Top P"
      },
      "max_tokens": {
         "default": 1024,
         "title": "Max Tokens",
         "type": "integer"
      },
      "endpoint_url": {
         "anyOf": [
            {
               "type": "string"
            },
            {
               "type": "null"
            }
         ],
         "default": null,
         "title": "Endpoint Url"
      },
      "model_name": {
         "default": "nvidia/NVIDIA-Nemotron-Nano-12B-v2-VL-BF16",
         "title": "Model Name",
         "type": "string"
      },
      "api_key": {
         "anyOf": [
            {
               "type": "string"
            },
            {
               "type": "null"
            }
         ],
         "default": null,
         "title": "Api Key"
      },
      "prompt": {
         "default": "Caption the content of this image:",
         "title": "Prompt",
         "type": "string"
      },
      "system_prompt": {
         "anyOf": [
            {
               "type": "string"
            },
            {
               "type": "null"
            }
         ],
         "default": "/no_think",
         "title": "System Prompt"
      },
      "batch_size": {
         "default": 8,
         "title": "Batch Size",
         "type": "integer"
      },
      "device": {
         "anyOf": [
            {
               "type": "string"
            },
            {
               "type": "null"
            }
         ],
         "default": null,
         "title": "Device"
      },
      "hf_cache_dir": {
         "anyOf": [
            {
               "type": "string"
            },
            {
               "type": "null"
            }
         ],
         "default": null,
         "title": "Hf Cache Dir"
      },
      "context_text_max_chars": {
         "default": 0,
         "title": "Context Text Max Chars",
         "type": "integer"
      },
      "tensor_parallel_size": {
         "default": 1,
         "title": "Tensor Parallel Size",
         "type": "integer"
      },
      "gpu_memory_utilization": {
         "default": 0.5,
         "title": "Gpu Memory Utilization",
         "type": "number"
      },
      "caption_infographics": {
         "default": false,
         "title": "Caption Infographics",
         "type": "boolean"
      },
      "extra_body": {
         "additionalProperties": true,
         "title": "Extra Body",
         "type": "object"
      }
   },
   "additionalProperties": false
}

pydantic model nemo_retriever.params.ChartParams[source]#

Bases: _ParamsModel

Show JSON schema
{
   "title": "ChartParams",
   "type": "object",
   "properties": {
      "remote": {
         "$ref": "#/$defs/RemoteInvokeParams"
      },
      "remote_retry": {
         "$ref": "#/$defs/RemoteRetryParams"
      },
      "inference_batch_size": {
         "default": 8,
         "title": "Inference Batch Size",
         "type": "integer"
      }
   },
   "$defs": {
      "RemoteInvokeParams": {
         "additionalProperties": false,
         "properties": {
            "invoke_url": {
               "anyOf": [
                  {
                     "type": "string"
                  },
                  {
                     "type": "null"
                  }
               ],
               "default": null,
               "title": "Invoke Url"
            },
            "api_key": {
               "anyOf": [
                  {
                     "type": "string"
                  },
                  {
                     "type": "null"
                  }
               ],
               "default": null,
               "title": "Api Key"
            },
            "request_timeout_s": {
               "default": 60.0,
               "title": "Request Timeout S",
               "type": "number"
            }
         },
         "title": "RemoteInvokeParams",
         "type": "object"
      },
      "RemoteRetryParams": {
         "additionalProperties": false,
         "properties": {
            "remote_max_pool_workers": {
               "default": 32,
               "title": "Remote Max Pool Workers",
               "type": "integer"
            },
            "remote_max_retries": {
               "default": 5,
               "title": "Remote Max Retries",
               "type": "integer"
            },
            "remote_max_429_retries": {
               "default": 3,
               "title": "Remote Max 429 Retries",
               "type": "integer"
            }
         },
         "title": "RemoteRetryParams",
         "type": "object"
      }
   },
   "additionalProperties": false
}

  • extra: str = forbid

         "default": true,
         "title": "Content Hash",

      },
      "bbox_iou": {
         "default": true,
         "title": "Bbox Iou",

      "iou_threshold": {
         "default": 0.45,
         "maximum": 1.0,
         "minimum": 0.0,
         "title": "Iou Threshold",
         "type": "number"
      }
   },

}

{

      "model_name": {
         "anyOf": [

               "type": "string"
            },
            {
               "type": "null"
            }
         ],

         "anyOf": [

               "type": "string"
            },
            {
               "type": "null"
            }
         ],
         "default": null,

      "api_key": {
         "anyOf": [
            {
               "type": "string"
            },
            {
               "type": "null"
            }
         ],
         "default": null,
         "title": "Api Key"
      },
      "input_type": {
         "default": "passage",
         "title": "Input Type",
         "type": "string"
      },
      "embed_modality": {
         "default": "text",
         "title": "Embed Modality",
         "type": "string"
      },
      "embed_granularity": {
         "default": "element",
         "enum": [
            "element",
            "page"
         ],
         "title": "Embed Granularity",
         "type": "string"
      },
      "text_elements_modality": {
         "anyOf": [
            {
               "type": "string"
            },
            {
               "type": "null"
            }
         ],
         "default": null,

      },

         "anyOf": [
            {
               "type": "string"
            },
            {
               "type": "null"
            }
         ],
         "default": null,
         "title": "Structured Elements Modality"
      },
      "text_column": {
         "default": "text",
         "title": "Text Column",
         "type": "string"
      },
      "inference_batch_size": {
         "default": 32,
         "title": "Inference Batch Size",
         "type": "integer"
      },
      "output_column": {
         "default": "text_embeddings_1b_v2",
         "title": "Output Column",
         "type": "string"
      },
      "embedding_dim_column": {
         "default": "text_embeddings_1b_v2_dim",
         "title": "Embedding Dim Column",
         "type": "string"
      },
      "has_embedding_column": {
         "default": "text_embeddings_1b_v2_has_embedding",
         "title": "Has Embedding Column",
         "type": "string"
      },
      "embed_output_column": {
         "default": "text_embeddings_1b_v2",
         "title": "Embed Output Column",
         "type": "string"
      },
      "embed_inference_batch_size": {
         "default": 16,
         "title": "Embed Inference Batch Size",
         "type": "integer"
      },
      "local_ingest_embed_backend": {
         "default": "vllm",
         "title": "Local Ingest Embed Backend",
         "type": "string"
      },
      "query_max_length": {
         "default": 128,
         "title": "Query Max Length",
         "type": "integer"
      },
      "dimensions": {
         "anyOf": [
            {
               "type": "integer"
            },
            {
               "type": "null"
            }
         ],
         "default": null,
         "title": "Dimensions"
      },
      "nim_http_max_concurrent": {
         "default": 32,
         "title": "Nim Http Max Concurrent",
         "type": "integer"
      },
      "request_timeout_s": {
         "default": 600.0,
         "title": "Request Timeout S",
         "type": "number"
      },
      "runtime": {
         "$ref": "#/$defs/ModelRuntimeParams"
      },
      "batch_tuning": {
         "$ref": "#/$defs/BatchTuningParams"
      }
   },
   "$defs": {
      "BatchTuningParams": {
         "additionalProperties": false,
         "properties": {
            "debug_run_id": {
               "default": "unknown",
               "title": "Debug Run Id",
               "type": "string"
            },
            "pdf_split_batch_size": {
               "default": 1,
               "title": "Pdf Split Batch Size",
               "type": "integer"
            },
            "pdf_extract_batch_size": {
               "default": 4,
               "title": "Pdf Extract Batch Size",
               "type": "integer"
            },
            "pdf_extract_num_cpus": {
               "default": 2,
               "title": "Pdf Extract Num Cpus",
               "type": "number"
            },
            "pdf_extract_workers": {
               "anyOf": [
                  {
                     "type": "integer"
                  },
                  {
                     "type": "null"
                  }
               ],
               "default": null,
               "title": "Pdf Extract Workers"
            },
            "page_elements_batch_size": {
               "default": 24,
               "title": "Page Elements Batch Size",
               "type": "integer"
            },
            "detect_batch_size": {
               "default": 24,
               "title": "Detect Batch Size",
               "type": "integer"
            },
            "ocr_inference_batch_size": {
               "anyOf": [
                  {
                     "type": "integer"
                  },
                  {
                     "type": "null"
                  }
               ],
               "default": null,

                     "type": "integer"

                     "type": "null"
                  }
               ],
               "default": null,
               "title": "Page Elements Workers"

            "ocr_workers": {

                     "type": "integer"
                  },
                  {
                     "type": "null"
                  }
               ],
               "default": null,
               "title": "Ocr Workers"

               "anyOf": [

                     "type": "integer"
                  },
                  {
                     "type": "null"
                  }
               ],
               "default": null,
               "title": "Detect Workers"
            },
            "page_elements_cpus_per_actor": {
               "default": 1,
               "title": "Page Elements Cpus Per Actor",
               "type": "number"
            },
            "ocr_cpus_per_actor": {

               "default": null,

            },
            "table_structure_cpus_per_actor": {
               "default": 1,
               "title": "Table Structure Cpus Per Actor",
               "type": "number"
            },

               "anyOf": [

                     "type": "integer"
                  },
                  {
                     "type": "null"
                  }
               ],
               "default": null,
               "title": "Embed Workers"
            },
            "embed_batch_size": {
               "default": 32,
               "title": "Embed Batch Size",
               "type": "integer"
            },
            "embed_cpus_per_actor": {
               "default": 1,
               "title": "Embed Cpus Per Actor",
               "type": "number"

pydantic model nemo_retriever.params.ExtractParams[source]#

Bases: _ParamsModel

Show JSON schema
{
   "title": "ExtractParams",
   "type": "object",
   "properties": {
      "extract_text": {
         "default": true,
         "title": "Extract Text",
         "type": "boolean"
      },
      "extract_images": {
         "default": true,
         "title": "Extract Images",
         "type": "boolean"
      },
      "extract_tables": {
         "default": true,
         "title": "Extract Tables",
         "type": "boolean"
      },
      "extract_charts": {
         "default": true,
         "title": "Extract Charts",
         "type": "boolean"
      },
      "extract_infographics": {
         "default": true,
         "title": "Extract Infographics",
         "type": "boolean"
      },
      "extract_page_as_image": {
         "anyOf": [
            {
               "type": "boolean"
            },
            {
               "type": "null"
            }
         ],
         "default": null,
         "title": "Extract Page As Image"
      },
      "method": {
         "default": "pdfium",
         "title": "Method",
         "type": "string"
      },
      "use_page_elements": {
         "default": true,
         "title": "Use Page Elements",
         "type": "boolean"
      },
      "use_table_structure": {
         "default": false,
         "title": "Use Table Structure",
         "type": "boolean"
      },
      "table_output_format": {
         "anyOf": [
            {
               "enum": [
                  "pseudo_markdown",
                  "markdown"
               ],
               "type": "string"
            },
            {
               "type": "null"
            }
         ],
         "default": null,
         "title": "Table Output Format"
      },
      "use_graphic_elements": {
         "default": false,
         "title": "Use Graphic Elements",
         "type": "boolean"
      },
      "dpi": {
         "default": 200,
         "title": "Dpi",
         "type": "integer"
      },
      "image_format": {
         "default": "jpeg",
         "title": "Image Format",
         "type": "string"
      },
      "jpeg_quality": {
         "default": 100,
         "title": "Jpeg Quality",
         "type": "integer"
      },
      "render_mode": {
         "default": "fit_to_model",
         "enum": [
            "full_dpi",
            "fit_to_model"
         ],
         "title": "Render Mode",
         "type": "string"
      },
      "inference_batch_size": {
         "default": 8,
         "title": "Inference Batch Size",
         "type": "integer"
      },
      "ocr_model_dir": {
         "anyOf": [
            {
               "type": "string"
            },
            {
               "type": "null"
            }
         ],
         "default": null,
         "title": "Ocr Model Dir"
      },
      "ocr_version": {
         "default": "v2",
         "enum": [
            "v1",
            "v2"
         ],
         "title": "Ocr Version",
         "type": "string"
      },
      "ocr_lang": {
         "anyOf": [
            {
               "enum": [
                  "multi",
                  "english"
               ],
               "type": "string"
            },
            {
               "type": "null"
            }
         ],
         "default": null,
         "title": "Ocr Lang"
      },
      "invoke_url": {
         "anyOf": [
            {
               "type": "string"
            },
            {
               "type": "null"
            }
         ],
         "default": null,
         "title": "Invoke Url"
      },
      "api_key": {
         "anyOf": [
            {
               "type": "string"
            },
            {
               "type": "null"
            }
         ],
         "default": null,
         "title": "Api Key"
      },
      "request_timeout_s": {
         "default": 60.0,
         "title": "Request Timeout S",
         "type": "number"
      },
      "page_elements_invoke_url": {
         "anyOf": [
            {
               "type": "string"
            },
            {
               "type": "null"
            }
         ],
         "default": null,
         "title": "Page Elements Invoke Url"
      },
      "page_elements_api_key": {
         "anyOf": [
            {
               "type": "string"
            },
            {
               "type": "null"
            }
         ],
         "default": null,
         "title": "Page Elements Api Key"
      },
      "page_elements_request_timeout_s": {
         "anyOf": [
            {
               "type": "number"
            },
            {
               "type": "null"
            }
         ],
         "default": null,
         "title": "Page Elements Request Timeout S"
      },
      "ocr_invoke_url": {
         "anyOf": [
            {
               "type": "string"
            },
            {
               "type": "null"
            }
         ],
         "default": null,
         "title": "Ocr Invoke Url"
      },
      "ocr_api_key": {
         "anyOf": [
            {
               "type": "string"
            },
            {
               "type": "null"
            }
         ],
         "default": null,
         "title": "Ocr Api Key"
      },
      "ocr_request_timeout_s": {
         "anyOf": [
            {
               "type": "number"
            },
            {
               "type": "null"
            }
         ],
         "default": null,
         "title": "Ocr Request Timeout S"
      },
      "graphic_elements_invoke_url": {
         "anyOf": [
            {
               "type": "string"
            },
            {
               "type": "null"
            }
         ],
         "default": null,
         "title": "Graphic Elements Invoke Url"

      "table_structure_invoke_url": {
         "anyOf": [
            {
               "type": "string"
            },
            {
               "type": "null"
            }
         ],
         "default": null,
         "title": "Table Structure Invoke Url"
      },
      "nemotron_parse_invoke_url": {
         "anyOf": [
            {
               "type": "string"
            },
            {
               "type": "null"
            }
         ],
         "default": null,
         "title": "Nemotron Parse Invoke Url"
      },
      "nemotron_parse_model": {
         "anyOf": [
            {
               "type": "string"
            },
            {
               "type": "null"
            }
         ],
         "default": null,
         "title": "Nemotron Parse Model"
      },
      "output_column": {
         "default": "page_elements_v3",
         "title": "Output Column",
         "type": "string"
      },
      "num_detections_column": {
         "default": "page_elements_v3_num_detections",
         "title": "Num Detections Column",
         "type": "string"
      },
      "counts_by_label_column": {
         "default": "page_elements_v3_counts_by_label",
         "title": "Counts By Label Column",
         "type": "string"
      },
      "remote_retry": {
         "$ref": "#/$defs/RemoteRetryParams"
      },
      "batch_tuning": {
         "$ref": "#/$defs/BatchTuningParams"
      }
   },
   "$defs": {
      "BatchTuningParams": {
         "additionalProperties": false,
         "properties": {
            "debug_run_id": {
               "default": "unknown",
               "title": "Debug Run Id",
               "type": "string"
            },
            "pdf_split_batch_size": {
               "default": 1,
               "title": "Pdf Split Batch Size",
               "type": "integer"
            },
            "pdf_extract_batch_size": {
               "default": 4,
               "title": "Pdf Extract Batch Size",
               "type": "integer"
            },
            "pdf_extract_num_cpus": {
               "default": 2,
               "title": "Pdf Extract Num Cpus",
               "type": "number"
            },
            "pdf_extract_workers": {
               "anyOf": [
                  {
                     "type": "integer"
                  },
                  {
                     "type": "null"
                  }
               ],
               "default": null,
               "title": "Pdf Extract Workers"
            },
            "page_elements_batch_size": {
               "default": 24,
               "title": "Page Elements Batch Size",
               "type": "integer"
            },
            "detect_batch_size": {
               "default": 24,
               "title": "Detect Batch Size",
               "type": "integer"
            },
            "ocr_inference_batch_size": {
               "anyOf": [
                  {
                     "type": "integer"
                  },
                  {
                     "type": "null"
                  }
               ],
               "default": null,
               "title": "Ocr Inference Batch Size"
            },
            "page_elements_workers": {
               "anyOf": [
                  {
                     "type": "integer"
                  },
                  {
                     "type": "null"
                  }
               ],
               "default": null,
               "title": "Page Elements Workers"
            },
            "ocr_workers": {
               "anyOf": [
                  {
                     "type": "integer"
                  },
                  {
                     "type": "null"
                  }
               ],
               "default": null,
               "title": "Ocr Workers"
            },
            "detect_workers": {
               "anyOf": [
                  {
                     "type": "integer"
                  },
                  {
                     "type": "null"
                  }
               ],
               "default": null,
               "title": "Detect Workers"
            },
            "page_elements_cpus_per_actor": {
               "default": 1,
               "title": "Page Elements Cpus Per Actor",
               "type": "number"
            },
            "ocr_cpus_per_actor": {
               "default": 1,
               "title": "Ocr Cpus Per Actor",
               "type": "number"
            },
            "table_structure_workers": {
               "anyOf": [
                  {
                     "type": "integer"
                  },
                  {
                     "type": "null"
                  }
               ],
               "default": null,
               "title": "Table Structure Workers"
            },
            "table_structure_batch_size": {
               "anyOf": [
                  {
                     "type": "integer"
                  },
                  {
                     "type": "null"
                  }
               ],
               "default": null,
               "title": "Table Structure Batch Size"
            },
            "table_structure_cpus_per_actor": {
               "default": 1,
               "title": "Table Structure Cpus Per Actor",
               "type": "number"
            },
            "embed_workers": {
               "anyOf": [
                  {
                     "type": "integer"
                  },
                  {
                     "type": "null"
                  }
               ],
               "default": null,
               "title": "Embed Workers"
            },
            "embed_batch_size": {
               "default": 32,
               "title": "Embed Batch Size",
               "type": "integer"
            },
            "embed_cpus_per_actor": {
               "default": 1,
               "title": "Embed Cpus Per Actor",
               "type": "number"
            },
            "gpu_page_elements": {
               "anyOf": [
                  {
                     "type": "number"
                  },
                  {
                     "type": "null"
                  }
               ],
               "default": null,
               "title": "Gpu Page Elements"
            },
            "gpu_ocr": {
               "anyOf": [
                  {
                     "type": "number"
                  },
                  {
                     "type": "null"
                  }
               ],
               "default": null,
               "title": "Gpu Ocr"
            },
            "gpu_table_structure": {
               "anyOf": [
                  {
                     "type": "number"
                  },
                  {
                     "type": "null"
                  }
               ],
               "default": null,
               "title": "Gpu Table Structure"
            },
            "gpu_embed": {
               "anyOf": [
                  {
                     "type": "number"
                  },
                  {
                     "type": "null"
                  }
               ],
               "default": null,
               "title": "Gpu Embed"
            },
            "nemotron_parse_workers": {
               "anyOf": [
                  {
                     "type": "integer"
                  },
                  {
                     "type": "null"
                  }
               ],
               "default": null,
               "title": "Nemotron Parse Workers"
            },
            "gpu_nemotron_parse": {
               "anyOf": [
                  {
                     "type": "number"
                  },
                  {
                     "type": "null"
                  }
               ],
               "default": null,
               "title": "Gpu Nemotron Parse"
            },
            "nemotron_parse_batch_size": {
               "anyOf": [
                  {
                     "type": "integer"
                  },
                  {
                     "type": "null"
                  }
               ],
               "default": null,
               "title": "Nemotron Parse Batch Size"
            },
            "store_workers": {
               "anyOf": [
                  {
                     "type": "integer"
                  },
                  {
                     "type": "null"
                  }
               ],
               "default": null,
               "title": "Store Workers"
            },
            "inference_batch_size": {
               "default": 8,
               "title": "Inference Batch Size",
               "type": "integer"
            }
         },
         "title": "BatchTuningParams",
         "type": "object"
      },
      "RemoteRetryParams": {
         "additionalProperties": false,
         "properties": {
            "remote_max_pool_workers": {
               "default": 32,
               "title": "Remote Max Pool Workers",
               "type": "integer"
            },
            "remote_max_retries": {
               "default": 5,
               "title": "Remote Max Retries",
               "type": "integer"
            },
            "remote_max_429_retries": {
               "default": 3,
               "title": "Remote Max 429 Retries",
               "type": "integer"
            }
         },
         "title": "RemoteRetryParams",
         "type": "object"
      }
   },
   "additionalProperties": false
}
