pydantic model nemo_retriever.params.InfographicParams[source]#

Bases: _ParamsModel

Show JSON schema
{
   "title": "InfographicParams",
   "type": "object",
   "properties": {
      "remote": {
         "$ref": "#/$defs/RemoteInvokeParams"
      },
      "remote_retry": {
         "$ref": "#/$defs/RemoteRetryParams"
      },
      "inference_batch_size": {
         "default": 8,
         "title": "Inference Batch Size",
         "type": "integer"
      },
      "allowed_page_element_labels": {
         "default": [
            "infographic",
            "title"
         ],
         "items": {
            "type": "string"
         },
         "title": "Allowed Page Element Labels",
         "type": "array"
      },
      "output_column": {
         "default": "infographic_elements_v1",
         "title": "Output Column",
         "type": "string"
      },
      "num_detections_column": {
         "default": "infographic_elements_v1_num_detections",
         "title": "Num Detections Column",
         "type": "string"
      },
      "counts_by_label_column": {
         "default": "infographic_elements_v1_counts_by_label",
         "title": "Counts By Label Column",
         "type": "string"
      }
   },
   "$defs": {
      "RemoteInvokeParams": {
         "additionalProperties": false,
         "properties": {
            "invoke_url": {
               "anyOf": [
                  {
                     "type": "string"
                  },
                  {
                     "type": "null"
                  }
               ],
               "default": null,
               "title": "Invoke Url"
            },
            "api_key": {
               "anyOf": [
                  {
                     "type": "string"
                  },
                  {
                     "type": "null"
                  }
               ],
               "default": null,
               "title": "Api Key"
            },
            "request_timeout_s": {
               "default": 60.0,
               "title": "Request Timeout S",
               "type": "number"
            }
         },
         "title": "RemoteInvokeParams",
         "type": "object"
      },
      "RemoteRetryParams": {
         "additionalProperties": false,
         "properties": {
            "remote_max_pool_workers": {
               "default": 32,
               "title": "Remote Max Pool Workers",
               "type": "integer"
            },
            "remote_max_retries": {
               "default": 5,
               "title": "Remote Max Retries",
               "type": "integer"
            },
            "remote_max_429_retries": {
               "default": 3,
               "title": "Remote Max 429 Retries",
               "type": "integer"
            }
         },
         "title": "RemoteRetryParams",
         "type": "object"
      }
   },
   "additionalProperties": false
}

pydantic model nemo_retriever.params.IngestExecuteParams[source]#

Bases: _ParamsModel

Show JSON schema
{
   "title": "IngestExecuteParams",
   "type": "object",
   "properties": {
      "show_progress": {
         "default": false,
         "title": "Show Progress",
         "type": "boolean"
      },
      "return_failures": {
         "default": false,
         "title": "Return Failures",
         "type": "boolean"
      },
      "save_to_disk": {
         "default": false,
         "title": "Save To Disk",
         "type": "boolean"
      },
      "return_traces": {
         "default": false,
         "title": "Return Traces",
         "type": "boolean"
      },
      "return_results": {
         "default": true,
         "title": "Return Results",
         "type": "boolean"
      },
      "parallel": {
         "default": false,
         "title": "Parallel",
         "type": "boolean"
      },
      "max_workers": {
         "anyOf": [
            {
               "type": "integer"
            },
            {
               "type": "null"
            }
         ],
         "default": null,
         "title": "Max Workers"
      },
      "gpu_devices": {
         "items": {
            "type": "string"
         },
         "title": "Gpu Devices",
         "type": "array"
      },
      "page_chunk_size": {
         "default": 32,
         "title": "Page Chunk Size",
         "type": "integer"
      },
      "runtime_metrics_dir": {
         "anyOf": [
            {
               "type": "string"
            },
            {
               "type": "null"
            }
         ],
         "default": null,
         "title": "Runtime Metrics Dir"
      },
      "runtime_metrics_prefix": {
         "anyOf": [
            {
               "type": "string"
            },
            {
               "type": "null"
            }
         ],
         "default": null,
         "title": "Runtime Metrics Prefix"
      }
   },
   "additionalProperties": false
}

Show JSON schema

   "title": "IngestorCreateParams",
   "type": "object",
   "properties": {

         "items": {
            "type": "string"
         },
         "title": "Documents",
         "type": "array"
      },
      "ray_address": {
         "anyOf": [
            {
               "type": "string"
            },
            {
               "type": "null"
            }
         ],
         "default": null,
         "title": "Ray Address"
      },
      "ray_log_to_driver": {
         "default": true,
         "title": "Ray Log To Driver",
         "type": "boolean"
      },
      "debug": {
         "default": false,
         "title": "Debug",
         "type": "boolean"
      },
      "base_url": {
         "default": "http://localhost:7670",
         "title": "Base Url",
         "type": "string"
      },
      "allow_no_gpu": {
         "default": false,
         "title": "Allow No Gpu",
         "type": "boolean"
      },
      "api_key": {

               "type": "string"
            },
            {
               "type": "null"
            }
         ],

         "title": "Api Key"
      },
      "error_policy": {
         "default": "raise",
         "enum": [
            "raise",
            "collect"
         ],
         "title": "Error Policy",
         "type": "string"
      },
      "max_concurrency": {
         "anyOf": [
            {
               "type": "integer"
            },
            {
               "type": "null"
            }
         ],
         "default": null,
         "title": "Max Concurrency"
      }
   },
   "additionalProperties": false
}

pydantic model nemo_retriever.params.LLMInferenceParams[source]#

Bases: _ParamsModel

Reusable LLM sampling / generation parameters.

Inherit from this model to add temperature, top_p, and max_tokens to any task that invokes an LLM (captioning, summarization, etc.).

Show JSON schema
{
   "title": "LLMInferenceParams",
   "description": "Reusable LLM sampling / generation parameters.\n\nInherit from this model to add temperature, top_p, and max_tokens\nto any task that invokes an LLM (captioning, summarization, etc.).",
   "type": "object",
   "properties": {
      "temperature": {
         "default": 1.0,
         "title": "Temperature",
         "type": "number"
      },
      "top_p": {
         "anyOf": [
            {
               "type": "number"
            },
            {
               "type": "null"
            }
         ],
         "default": null,
         "title": "Top P"
      },
      "max_tokens": {
         "default": 1024,
         "title": "Max Tokens",
         "type": "integer"
      }
   },
   "additionalProperties": false
}

Config:

  • extra: str = forbid

Fields:

  • max_tokens (int)

  • temperature (float)

  • top_p (Optional[float])

Validators:

  • _check_max_tokens » max_tokens

  • _check_temperature » temperature

  • _check_top_p » top_p

field max_tokens: int = 1024#
Validated by:

  • _check_max_tokens

  • _resolve_api_keys

field temperature: float = 1.0#
Validated by:

  • _check_temperature

  • _resolve_api_keys

field top_p: float | None = None#
Validated by:

  • _check_top_p

  • _resolve_api_keys

to_sampling_kwargs() → dict[str, Any][source]#

Build a dict of sampling parameters suitable for LLM inference calls.

top_p is only included when explicitly set (not None), because many backends (vLLM, OpenAI, NIM) change behaviour when the key is present vs. absent.

pydantic model nemo_retriever.params.LLMRemoteClientParams[source]#

Bases: _ParamsModel

Transport / connection parameters for any remote LLM client.

Pairs with LLMInferenceParams (sampling) to fully specify a call. api_key is auto-resolved from the environment by _ParamsModel when left as None.

Show JSON schema
{
   "title": "LLMRemoteClientParams",
   "description": "Transport / connection parameters for any remote LLM client.\n\nPairs with :class:`LLMInferenceParams` (sampling) to fully specify a\ncall.  ``api_key`` is auto-resolved from the environment by\n:class:`_ParamsModel` when left as ``None``.",
   "type": "object",
   "properties": {
      "model": {
         "title": "Model",
         "type": "string"
      },
      "api_base": {
         "anyOf": [
            {
               "type": "string"
            },
            {
               "type": "null"
            }
         ],
         "default": null,
         "title": "Api Base"
      },
      "api_key": {
         "anyOf": [
            {
               "type": "string"
            },
            {
               "type": "null"
            }
         ],
         "default": null,
         "title": "Api Key"
      },
      "num_retries": {
         "default": 3,
         "title": "Num Retries",
         "type": "integer"
      },
      "timeout": {
         "default": 120.0,
         "title": "Timeout",
         "type": "number"
      },
      "extra_params": {
         "additionalProperties": true,
         "title": "Extra Params",
         "type": "object"
      }
   },
   "additionalProperties": false,
   "required": [
      "model"
   ]
}

Config:

  • extra: str = forbid

Fields:

  • api_base (Optional[str])

  • api_key (Optional[str])

  • extra_params (dict[str, Any])

  • model (str)

  • num_retries (int)

  • timeout (float)

Validators:

  • _check_retries » num_retries

  • _check_timeout » timeout

field api_base: str | None = None#
Validated by:

  • _resolve_api_keys

field api_key: str | None = None#
Validated by:

  • _resolve_api_keys

field extra_params: dict[str, Any] [Optional]#
Validated by:

  • _resolve_api_keys

field model: str [Required]#
Validated by:

  • _resolve_api_keys

field num_retries: int = 3#
Validated by:

  • _check_retries

  • _resolve_api_keys

field timeout: float = 120.0#
Validated by:

  • _check_timeout

  • _resolve_api_keys

Bases: _ParamsModel

Show JSON schema
{
   "title": "LanceDbParams",
   "type": "object",
   "properties": {
      "lancedb_uri": {
         "default": "lancedb",
         "title": "Lancedb Uri",
         "type": "string"
      },
      "table_name": {
         "default": "nv-ingest",
         "title": "Table Name",
         "type": "string"
      },
      "overwrite": {
         "default": true,
         "title": "Overwrite",
         "type": "boolean"
      },
      "create_index": {
         "default": true,
         "title": "Create Index",
         "type": "boolean"
      },
      "index_type": {
         "default": "IVF_HNSW_SQ",
         "title": "Index Type",
         "type": "string"
      },
      "metric": {
         "default": "l2",
         "title": "Metric",
         "type": "string"
      },
      "num_partitions": {
         "default": 16,
         "title": "Num Partitions",
         "type": "integer"
      },
      "num_sub_vectors": {
         "default": 256,
         "title": "Num Sub Vectors",
         "type": "integer"
      },
      "embedding_column": {
         "default": "text_embeddings_1b_v2",
         "title": "Embedding Column",
         "type": "string"
      },
      "embedding_key": {
         "default": "embedding",
         "title": "Embedding Key",
         "type": "string"
      },
      "include_text": {
         "default": true,
         "title": "Include Text",
         "type": "boolean"
      },
      "text_column": {
         "default": "text",
         "title": "Text Column",
         "type": "string"
      },
      "hybrid": {
         "default": false,
         "title": "Hybrid",
         "type": "boolean"
      },
      "fts_language": {
         "default": "English",
         "title": "Fts Language",
         "type": "string"
      }
   },
   "additionalProperties": false
}

   "title": "OcrParams",
   "type": "object",
   "properties": {
      "remote": {
         "$ref": "#/$defs/RemoteInvokeParams"
      },
      "remote_retry": {
         "$ref": "#/$defs/RemoteRetryParams"
      },
      "inference_batch_size": {
         "default": 8,
         "title": "Inference Batch Size",
         "type": "integer"
      },
      "extract_tables": {
         "default": false,
         "title": "Extract Tables",
         "type": "boolean"
      },
      "extract_charts": {
         "default": false,
         "title": "Extract Charts",
         "type": "boolean"
      },
      "extract_infographics": {
         "default": false,
         "title": "Extract Infographics",
         "type": "boolean"
      }
   },
   "$defs": {
      "RemoteInvokeParams": {
         "additionalProperties": false,
         "properties": {
            "invoke_url": {
               "anyOf": [
                  {
                     "type": "string"
                  },
                  {
                     "type": "null"
                  }
               ],
               "default": null,
               "title": "Invoke Url"
            },
            "api_key": {
               "anyOf": [
                  {
                     "type": "string"
                  },
                  {
                     "type": "null"
                  }
               ],
               "default": null,
               "title": "Api Key"
            },
            "request_timeout_s": {
               "default": 60.0,
               "title": "Request Timeout S",
               "type": "number"
            }
         },
         "title": "RemoteInvokeParams",
         "type": "object"
      },
      "RemoteRetryParams": {
         "additionalProperties": false,
         "properties": {
            "remote_max_pool_workers": {
               "default": 32,
               "title": "Remote Max Pool Workers",
               "type": "integer"
            },
            "remote_max_retries": {
               "default": 5,
               "title": "Remote Max Retries",
               "type": "integer"
            },
            "remote_max_429_retries": {
               "default": 3,
               "title": "Remote Max 429 Retries",
               "type": "integer"
            }
         },
         "title": "RemoteRetryParams",
         "type": "object"
      }
   },
   "additionalProperties": false
}

Show JSON schema
{
   "title": "StoreParams",
   "type": "object",
   "properties": {
      "storage_uri": {
         "default": "stored_images",
         "title": "Storage Uri",
         "type": "string"
      },
      "storage_options": {
         "additionalProperties": true,
         "title": "Storage Options",
         "type": "object"
      },
      "image_format": {
         "default": "png",
         "title": "Image Format",
         "type": "string"
      },
      "strip_base64": {
         "default": true,
         "title": "Strip Base64",
         "type": "boolean"
      },
      "batch_tuning": {
         "$ref": "#/$defs/BatchTuningParams"
      }
   },
   "$defs": {
      "BatchTuningParams": {
         "additionalProperties": false,
         "properties": {
            "debug_run_id": {
               "default": "unknown",
               "title": "Debug Run Id",
               "type": "string"
            },
            "pdf_split_batch_size": {
               "default": 1,
               "title": "Pdf Split Batch Size",
               "type": "integer"
            },
            "pdf_extract_batch_size": {
               "default": 4,
               "title": "Pdf Extract Batch Size",
               "type": "integer"
            },

               "default": 2,
               "title": "Pdf Extract Num Cpus",
               "type": "number"
            },

               "anyOf": [
                  {
                     "type": "integer"
                  },
                  {
                     "type": "null"
                  }
               ],
               "default": null,
               "title": "Pdf Extract Workers"
            },
            "page_elements_batch_size": {
               "default": 24,
               "title": "Page Elements Batch Size",
               "type": "integer"
            },
            "detect_batch_size": {
               "default": 24,
               "title": "Detect Batch Size",
               "type": "integer"
            },
            "ocr_inference_batch_size": {
               "anyOf": [

                     "type": "integer"

                     "type": "null"

               "default": null,

                     "type": "integer"

               "default": null,

               "default": 1,
               "title": "Page Elements Cpus Per Actor",
               "type": "number"

               "default": 1,
               "title": "Table Structure Cpus Per Actor",
               "type": "number"

                     "type": "integer"

               "default": null,

            "embed_batch_size": {
               "default": 32,
               "title": "Embed Batch Size",
               "type": "integer"

            "embed_cpus_per_actor": {
               "default": 1,
               "title": "Embed Cpus Per Actor",
               "type": "number"
            },
            "gpu_page_elements": {
               "anyOf": [
                  {
                     "type": "number"
                  },

                     "type": "null"
                  }

               "default": null,

                     "type": "number"

      },

      },
      "output_column": {

         "title": "Output Column",
         "type": "string"

      "counts_by_label_column": {
         "default": "table_structure_v1_counts_by_label",
         "title": "Counts By Label Column",

   "$defs": {

         "additionalProperties": false,

               "anyOf": [

                     "type": "string"
                  },
                  {

               "default": null,
               "title": "Api Key"
            },
            "request_timeout_s": {
               "default": 60.0,
               "title": "Request Timeout S",
               "type": "number"
            }
         },
         "title": "RemoteInvokeParams",
         "type": "object"
      },
      "RemoteRetryParams": {
         "additionalProperties": false,
         "properties": {

               "default": 32,

               "type": "integer"

               "default": 3,
               "title": "Remote Max 429 Retries",
               "type": "integer"
            }

         "title": "RemoteRetryParams",
         "type": "object"
      }
   },
   "additionalProperties": false
}

pydantic model nemo_retriever.params.TabularExtractParams[source]#

Bases: _ParamsModel

Params for step 1: extract schema metadata and write to Neo4j.

Covers SQLAlchemy reflection of a live database and/or parsing of pre-existing SQL DDL/query files. Produces Database, Schema, Table, Column, View and Query nodes together with their relationships. The Neo4j connection is provided by get_neo4j_conn() (see tabular_data.neo4j) and is not configured here.

Show JSON schema
{
   "title": "TabularExtractParams",
   "type": "object",
   "properties": {
      "connector": {
         "default": null,
         "title": "Connector"
      }
   },
   "additionalProperties": false
}

Config:

  • extra: str = forbid

  • arbitrary_types_allowed: bool = True

Fields:

  • connector (Optional[SQLDatabase])

Validators:

field connector: SQLDatabase | None = None#
Validated by:

  • _resolve_api_keys

pydantic model nemo_retriever.params.VdbUploadParams[source]#

Bases: _ParamsModel

Post-graph vector DB upload configuration.

Sidecar metadata (meta_*) matches nv_ingest_client / metadata_and_filtered_search.ipynb: all three fields must be set together to merge columns into each chunk’s content_metadata.

Show JSON schema
{
   "title": "VdbUploadParams",
   "description": "Post-graph vector DB upload configuration.\n\nSidecar metadata (``meta_*``) matches ``nv_ingest_client`` / ``metadata_and_filtered_search.ipynb``:\nall three fields must be set together to merge columns into each chunk's ``content_metadata``.",
   "type": "object",
   "properties": {
      "vdb_op": {
         "default": "lancedb",
         "title": "Vdb Op",
         "type": "string"
      },
      "vdb_kwargs": {
         "additionalProperties": true,
         "title": "Vdb Kwargs",
         "type": "object"
      },
      "meta_dataframe": {
         "anyOf": [
            {},
            {
               "type": "null"
            }
         ],
         "default": null,
         "title": "Meta Dataframe"
      },
      "meta_source_field": {
         "anyOf": [
            {
               "type": "string"
            },
            {
               "type": "null"
            }
         ],
         "default": null,
         "title": "Meta Source Field"
      },
      "meta_fields": {
         "anyOf": [
            {
               "items": {
                  "type": "string"
               },
               "type": "array"
            },
            {
               "type": "null"
            }
         ],
         "default": null,
         "title": "Meta Fields"
      },
      "meta_join_key": {
         "default": "auto",
         "enum": [
            "auto",
            "source_id",
            "source_name"
         ],
         "title": "Meta Join Key",
         "type": "string"
      }
   },
   "additionalProperties": false
}

Config:

  • extra: str = forbid

pydantic model nemo_retriever.params.VideoFrameParams[source]#

Bases: _ParamsModel

Params for video frame extraction (ffmpeg fps + perceptual-hash dedup).

Set enabled=False to skip frame extraction entirely; the video pipeline then produces only audio (ASR) rows — no frame OCR, no audio+visual fusion. Useful for ablating the visual modality or for audio-only recall benchmarks against video corpora.

dedup activates perceptual-hash (dhash) dedup before OCR. dhash catches visually-identical adjacent frames that byte-level hashing misses (encoder noise, brightness drift, etc.). On a 60s slide-heavy sample we measured ~91% duplicates collapsed at distance 5 vs ~11% for MD5 — a near-10x cut in OCR cost on slide content. Tune dedup_max_hamming_distance upward for more aggressive merging or down to 0 to require exact perceptual-hash matches.

Show JSON schema
{
   "title": "VideoFrameParams",
   "description": "Params for video frame extraction (ffmpeg fps + perceptual-hash dedup).\n\nSet ``enabled=False`` to skip frame extraction entirely; the video\npipeline then produces only audio (ASR) rows \u2014 no frame OCR, no\naudio+visual fusion. Useful for ablating the visual modality or for\naudio-only recall benchmarks against video corpora.\n\n``dedup`` activates perceptual-hash (dhash) dedup before OCR. dhash\ncatches visually-identical adjacent frames that byte-level hashing\nmisses (encoder noise, brightness drift, etc.). On a 60s slide-heavy\nsample we measured ~91% duplicates collapsed at distance 5 vs ~11%\nfor MD5 \u2014 a near-10x cut in OCR cost on slide content. Tune\n``dedup_max_hamming_distance`` upward for more aggressive merging or\ndown to 0 to require exact perceptual-hash matches.",
   "type": "object",
   "properties": {
      "enabled": {
         "default": true,
         "title": "Enabled",
         "type": "boolean"
      },
      "fps": {
         "default": 1.0,
         "exclusiveMinimum": 0.0,
         "title": "Fps",
         "type": "number"
      },
      "max_frames": {
         "anyOf": [
            {
               "type": "integer"
            },
            {
               "type": "null"
            }
         ],
         "default": null,
         "title": "Max Frames"
      },
      "dedup": {
         "default": true,
         "title": "Dedup",
         "type": "boolean"
      },
      "dedup_max_hamming_distance": {
         "default": 5,
         "title": "Dedup Max Hamming Distance",
         "type": "integer"
      },
      "dedup_max_dropped_frames": {
         "default": 2,
         "title": "Dedup Max Dropped Frames",
         "type": "integer"
      }
   },
   "additionalProperties": false
}

Config:

  • extra: str = forbid

Fields:

  • dedup (bool)

  • dedup_max_dropped_frames (int)

  • dedup_max_hamming_distance (int)

  • enabled (bool)

  • fps (float)

  • max_frames (Optional[int])

Validators:

field dedup: bool = True#
Validated by:

  • _resolve_api_keys

field dedup_max_dropped_frames: int = 2#
Validated by:

  • _resolve_api_keys

field dedup_max_hamming_distance: int = 5#
Validated by:

  • _resolve_api_keys

field enabled: bool = True#
Validated by:

Validated by:

field max_frames: int | None = None#
Validated by:

  • _resolve_api_keys

pydantic model nemo_retriever.params.VideoFrameTextDedupParams[source]#

Bases: _ParamsModel

Params for merging consecutive video_frame rows with identical OCR text.

After full-frame OCR, slides that are visible for many seconds produce a flood of frames with the same text (image-hash dedup misses them when encoder noise differs frame-to-frame). This stage groups by (source_path, text) and merges adjacent runs into a single row whose segment_start_seconds / segment_end_seconds cover the union of the run.

Tolerance is expressed in dropped frames, not seconds, so it scales with video_frame_fps: at runtime the dedup reads each group’s metadata.fps and converts to max_gap_seconds = max_dropped_frames / fps. Default 2 means we bridge gaps of up to 2 missing frames in a run — a typical safety margin for image-hash dedup leaving small holes.

Show JSON schema
{
   "title": "VideoFrameTextDedupParams",
   "description": "Params for merging consecutive video_frame rows with identical OCR text.\n\nAfter full-frame OCR, slides that are visible for many seconds produce a\nflood of frames with the same text (image-hash dedup misses them when\nencoder noise differs frame-to-frame). This stage groups by\n``(source_path, text)`` and merges adjacent runs into a single row whose\n``segment_start_seconds`` / ``segment_end_seconds`` cover the union of\nthe run.\n\nTolerance is expressed in **dropped frames**, not seconds, so it scales\nwith ``video_frame_fps``: at runtime the dedup reads each group's\n``metadata.fps`` and converts to ``max_gap_seconds = max_dropped_frames / fps``.\nDefault 2 means we bridge gaps of up to 2 missing frames in a run \u2014\na typical safety margin for image-hash dedup leaving small holes.",
   "type": "object",
   "properties": {
      "enabled": {
         "default": true,
         "title": "Enabled",
         "type": "boolean"
      },
      "max_dropped_frames": {
         "default": 2,
         "title": "Max Dropped Frames",
         "type": "integer"
      }
   },
   "additionalProperties": false
}

Config:

  • extra: str = forbid

Fields:

  • enabled (bool)

  • max_dropped_frames (int)

Validators:

field enabled: bool = True#
Validated by:

  • _resolve_api_keys

field max_dropped_frames: int = 2#
Validated by:

  • _resolve_api_keys

pydantic model nemo_retriever.params.WebhookParams[source]#

Bases: _ParamsModel

Configuration for the webhook notification stage.

When endpoint_url is set, selected columns from the processed batch are serialised to JSON and HTTP-POSTed to that URL. If endpoint_url is None the stage is a no-op.

Show JSON schema
{
   "title": "WebhookParams",
   "description": "Configuration for the webhook notification stage.\n\nWhen ``endpoint_url`` is set, selected columns from the processed batch\nare serialised to JSON and HTTP-POSTed to that URL.  If ``endpoint_url``\nis ``None`` the stage is a no-op.",
   "type": "object",
   "properties": {
      "endpoint_url": {
         "anyOf": [
            {
               "type": "string"
            },
            {
               "type": "null"
            }
         ],
         "default": null,
         "title": "Endpoint Url"
      },
      "columns": {
         "items": {
            "type": "string"
         },
         "title": "Columns",
         "type": "array"
      },
      "headers": {
         "additionalProperties": {
            "type": "string"
         },
         "title": "Headers",
         "type": "object"
      },
      "timeout_s": {
         "default": 30.0,
         "title": "Timeout S",
         "type": "number"
      },
      "max_retries": {
         "default": 3,
         "title": "Max Retries",
         "type": "integer"
      }
   },
   "additionalProperties": false
}

Config:

  • extra: str = forbid

Fields:

  • columns (list[str])

  • endpoint_url (Optional[str])

  • headers (dict[str, str])

  • max_retries (int)

  • timeout_s (float)

nemo_retriever.params.resolve_split_params(
split_config: dict[str, Any] | None,
) → dict[str, Any][source]#

Resolve a user-supplied split_config dict into per-key effective params.

Returns a dict keyed by every entry in SPLIT_CONFIG_VALID_KEYS. Each value is one of: a TextChunkParams / HtmlChunkParams instance (chunking enabled for that key), None (key absent — chunking off via the default), or False (explicit opt-out sentinel).

Per-key values supplied by the caller may be a plain dict of chunk-params fields, a pre-built TextChunkParams / HtmlChunkParams instance (passed through verbatim), None, or False.

previous

nemo_retriever.page_elements package

next

nemo_retriever.parse package
